text:
There once was a tiny cat named Whiskers. He lived in a cozy little cottage on the edge of a forest. Every evening, Whiskers would watch the stars twinkle through the dense leaves.

One day, while playing beneath the willow tree, he heard a soft whisper.

Whiskers listened closer. It seemed to come from beyond a curtain of bushes. With no one there to see, he felt confident in piecing together what it said. It was a wish-list from the woodland fairies.

"In return for twinkling skies at midnight," the wish whispered, "dance for us."

Whiskers was taken aback. Dancing? How could he? But he was magical after all.

At midnight, under the silvery moonlight, his feet started gently moving. He shuffled and pranced. Old pine branches swayed. Birds stopped their singing. The stars turned warmer.

The enchantress fairies fluttered down from their branches, enchanted by Whiskers'
